topics.title: False Gossip Column Allegations
topics.summary: The studio addresses a recent gossip column containing several inaccuracies regarding the host's behavior at an antique show and his personal living arrangements.

topics.title: Promotional Strategy and Letterman Appearance
topics.summary: The studio discusses the marketing of a new free offering, the internal pressure to appear on David Letterman, and the absurdity of various suggested scripts for such an appearance.

topics.title: Radio Show Statistics and Comedy Bits
topics.summary: The studio discusses radio ratings, upcoming appearances, a news story about a young woman's medical decision, and various comedy routines.

topics.title: Comedy Jokes and Celebrity Encounters
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion about stand-up comedy, including stories of meeting Billy Joel at a music gala and the creation of controversial jokes that faced scrutiny from radio executives.

topics.title: Joan Rivers Comedy Special Promotion
topics.summary: The studio promotes Joan Rivers' upcoming comedy special on Bravo and her live performance at the Keswick Theatre while discussing her career, personal life, and celebrity friendships.

topics.title: Rush Limbaugh and Michael J. Fox
topics.summary: The studio discusses a controversial political advertisement featuring Michael J. Fox and the subsequent criticism from Rush Limbaugh regarding the portrayal of Parkinson's disease.

topics.title: Stem Cell Research and Political Hypocrisy
topics.summary: The show discusses the medical benefits of stem cell research, the controversy surrounding a politician's past actions regarding her husband's legal issues, and various entertainment news items.

topics.title: Stem Cell Research and Upcoming Roast
topics.summary: The studio discusses the ethics of stem cell research in relation to Parkinson's disease, critiques public figures like Rush Limbaugh and Ann Coulter, and prepares for an upcoming roast where they debate the boundaries of comedy regarding personal tragedies.

topics.title: Heavy Metal Trivia and Waxing Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heavy metal trivia competition where contestants risk being waxed by a professional if they answer questions incorrectly.

topics.title: Howard Stern Confronts Columnist Over Inaccurate Reporting
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange between Howard Stern and a columnist regarding the accuracy of reported claims about Stern's personal life and public behavior.

topics.title: Adult Film Industry Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a guest from the adult film industry who discusses her career, personal experiences with extreme acts, and her transition from being a salon stylist to appearing in films.

topics.title: Studio Guest Waxing and Performance
topics.summary: The studio features a guest from the band Watch Me Burn undergoing a waxing procedure while promoting their music before a porn star performs on a piece of equipment.

topics.title: Pixie Pearl and JD Interaction
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with porn star Pixie Pearl, who engages in dirty talk and discusses her career while the hosts debate potential partners for her.

topics.title: Reasons Men Avoid Marriage
topics.summary: The studio discusses a study on why men are hesitant to commit to marriage, citing factors such as the availability of sex outside of marriage, fear of divorce, and the desire to maintain a single lifestyle.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including rising restaurant prices, political controversies involving Hillary Clinton, celebrity legal issues, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
